fields.name: Brightening Serum with 10% Niacinamide Serum
fields.description:
About this item

  • ANTI PIGMENTATION AND TANNING SERUM: The combination of niacinamide & alpha arbutin improves the skin’s texture, evens out the skin tone and tackles hyperpigmentation and tanning.
  • FACE BRIGHTENING SERUM FOR GLOWING SKIN: This face brightening serum duo of niacinamide and alpha arbutin increases each other’s efficiency, improving the benefits multifold to give an enhanced brightening, which makes it perfect face serum for glowing skin.
  • SUITED FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: This brightening serum for face pigmentation is proven safe for all the skin types: oily, normal, dry & sensitive. The serum is for both men & women.
  • USAGE: Can be used upto twice a day on damp skin, both as a day serum or night serum. Use cleanser for oily skin before the serum and follow up with a moisturizer for face.
  • SAFE & EFFECTIVE FORMULATION: This facial serum is fragrance free, paraben free, sulphate freealcohol free and cruelty free
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Cleanse Your Face","desc":"Wash your face with a gentle face wash and pat dry with a clean towel."},{"title":"Apply Toner (Optional)","desc":"Use a toner to balance your skin and prepare it for better absorption"},{"title":"Take Serum Drops","desc":"Take 2–3 drops of serum on your fingertips."},{"title":"Apply on Face","desc":"Gently apply the serum on your face and neck using tapping motions."},{"title":"Massage & Absorb","desc":"Massage lightly until the serum is fully absorbed into the skin."}]

fields.name: Lakmē 9to5 Vitamin C +Serum
fields.description:
"Introducing the Lakme 9to5 VitC+ facial serum. Lakme’s first vitamin C serum in a revolutionary light weight formula that is enriched with the richest known source of Vitamin C – Kakadu Plum. This superfood is known to contain 100X more Vitamin C than oranges! Vitamin C also known as the beauty vitamin|| is a powerhouse of antioxidants which is known to provide a healthy skin barrier that can fight multiple skin problems like ageing|| pollution & sun damage and dullness of skin! Truly magical! Lakme 9to5 VitC+|| harnesses the power of this potent vitamin C and is designed to reduce skin dullness by fighting free radicals and promoting skin health. So|| you get nourished|| smooth skin with improved texture. Whats more! It’s easy to carry pack is handbag friendly|| that is perfect for your on the go lifestyle!
Key features:
- Light weight on skin
- Enriched with Kakadu plums
- Moisturises effectively
- Non greasy texture
- Improves skin feel
- Gives smooth skin
- Skin feels nourished
- No skin irritation
For best results|| use the Lakme 9to5 VitC+ facial serum twice daily|| morning and night on freshly cleansed face and follow it up with the Lakme 9to5 VitC+ day/night cream in the am or pm respectively.
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Cleanse Your Face","desc":"Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and pat dry to remove dirt and oil."},{"title":"Take Serum Drops","desc":"Take 2–3 drops of serum onto your fingertips."},{"title":"Apply & Massage","desc":"Gently apply on face and neck, then massage in upward circular motions until fully absorbed."},{"title":"Moisturize & Protect","desc":"Apply moisturizer to lock hydration. Use sunscreen in the daytime for best results."}]

fields.name: Advance Vitamin C Serum
fields.description:
Made with 10% Vitamin C, a serum designed for Indian skin. Powered by Vitamin C, Ferulic Acid, and Mandarin Orange Extract, it brightens, repairs, and protects against sun damage, pigmentation, and dark spots. Achieve glowing, even-toned skin with every use.

– Makes your skin brighter, Evens skin tone, Make your skin glowing and more healthier,

– Specially formulated to work for dark spots & Pigmentation.

– Clear Dark Spots and maintain skin firmness.

– Shields Skin from UV rays and Repairs damage cause by Sun.

– Boosts Collagen production which Boosts elasticity.

– Increases Skin moisture & Makes it glowing

– Anti- aging properties of this serum get you rid of signs of aging
fields.ingredients:
Vitamin C– Our Potent Serum Comes with Highly 3-0 Ethyl Ascorbic Acid which is found to be Most effective Form Of Vitamin C.  It is Very Effective in making your skin more brighter, lighter, makes your skin glowing, Treats Pigmentation and Gives you more Youthful looking Complexion. 

Carica Papaya Fruit Ext- Carica papaya fruit extract, derived from the tropical papaya fruit, offers a myriad of benefits for the skin. Rich in enzymes like papain, vitamins A, C, and E, and antioxidants, this extract works wonders for rejuvenating and nourishing the skin.

Ferulic Acid – A Very Powerful Antioxidant that has Anti-Aging properties, when this active combined with vitamin c than it Boosts effectiveness of The Products. Ferulic acids works on age spots, Lightens Dark spots and repairs skin from uv rays and sun damage.

Mandarin Orange Fruit Extract- Mandarin orange fruit extract, derived from the vibrant citrus fruit, offers a wealth of benefits for the skin. Bursting with vitamins C and E, as well as antioxidants and essential minerals, this extract provides a potent dose of nourishment and protection
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Cleanse Your Skin","desc":"Start with a face wash (like Proskire) to remove dirt, oil, and impurities. Pat your skin dry with a clean towel."},{"title":"Apply Vitamin C Serum","desc":"Take a small amount of serum on your fingertips and gently massage into your skin using upward and outward motions. Focus on dark spots or fine lines."},{"title":"Allow Absorption","desc":"Let the serum absorb for a few minutes before applying other skincare products."},{"title":"Use Daily","desc":"Use the serum daily, preferably in the morning, for best results. Consistency is key."}]

fields.name: Vitamin C Face Cleanser For Daily Glow & Brightness
fields.description: Infused with Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Glutathione, it gently cleanses while brightening the skin, reducing dark spots, and enhancing radiance. Achieve clean, glowing, and even-toned skin with every wash.
fields.ingredients:
Vitamin C – Helps brighten skin and reduce dark spots
Vitamin E – Nourishes and protects the skin
Glutathione – Supports skin glow and even tone
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Take Product","desc":"Apply a small amount of face wash onto your palm."},{"title":"Massage on Skin","desc":"Gently massage onto wet skin using circular motions."},{"title":"Rinse & Dry","desc":"Rinse thoroughly with water and pat your face dry with a clean towel."},{"title":"Use Daily","desc":"Use daily for best results and healthy-looking skin."}]

fields.name: Anua Heartleaf Deep Cleansing
fields.description: A cleansing foam formulated with Heartleaf extract, designed to provide deep pore cleansing and gently exfoliate dead skin cells.
fields.ingredients:
Houttuynia Cordata Flower/Leaf/Stem Water, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoyl Glycinate, Water, Sodium Lauroyl Glutamate, Disodiumn Cocoamphodiacetate, Coco-Glucoside, DecyI Glucoside, Hectorite, Sodium Chloride, 1,2-He xanediol, Betaine Salicylate, Potassium Benz oate, Houttuynia Cordata Powder, Polyquaternium-67, Acrylates/C10-30 Alky1 Acrylate Crosspolymer, Butylene Glycol, Gard enia Florida Fruit Extract, Dextrin, Disodium EDTA, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Ethylhexyl glycerin, Sodium Acetate, Isopropyl Alcohol, Pinus Palustris Leaf Extract, UImus Davidiana Root Extract, Oenothera Biennis (Evening Pr imrose) Flower Extract, Pueraria Lobata Root Extract, Pentylene Glycol'. Capryloyl Salicylic Acid, Tocopherol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluron ate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Potassium Hyaluron ate, Hydroxypropyltrimonium Hyaluronate, Sod jum Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Sodium Acetyl ated Hyaluronate, Quercetin

*Ingredients subject to change at manufacturer's discretion. For the most complete and up-to-date list of ingredients, please refer to product packaging.
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Remove Makeup (Optional)","desc":"Thoroughly cleanse makeup and sunscreen using a cleansing oil"},{"title":"Take Cleanser","desc":"Dispense an adequate amount of cleansing foam into your hands."},{"title":"Create Foam","desc":"Add a small amount of water and rub your hands to create a rich foam."},{"title":"Cleanse & Rinse","desc":"Gently massage onto your face in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly with water."}]

fields.name: Super Glow Vitamin c + magnesium serum
fields.description:
A nourishing Vitamin C serum for visibly smoother, more even-toned skin over time.

A lightweight, nourishing serum formulated with 5% Vitamin C derivative and Magnesium PCA. These ingredients team up to even skin tone, improve the appearance of dark spots, and replenish
fields.ingredients: Pro-Vitamin B5 and three molecular weights of Hyaluronic Acid pull moisture into the skin like a magnet (and keep it there) for instantly smooth, silky skin and long-lasting hydration.
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Cleanse & Tone","desc":"Start with a clean face. Use a cleanser and toner to prep your skin."},{"title":"Apply Serum Drops","desc":"Use the dropper to take 3–4 drops into your hands."},{"title":"Press Into Skin","desc":"Gently press the serum onto your skin until fully absorbed. The lightweight formula layers easily."},{"title":"Layer Other Serums","desc":"For best results, layer products from lightest to heaviest: Super Pure → Super Bounce → Super Glow."}]

fields.name: Santal & Vetiver Body Wash
fields.description:
Sunlight sparkles on softly rolling waves. A deep breath. Awaken. Energize. Lift. Plunge into depths of eucalyptus and orange blossom, earthy vetiver and amber, warm and lingering. Crisp bergamot and sharp grapefruit punctuate—a fresh start, a new day.

Notes:
Top — Italian Bergamot, Grapefruit
Heart — Hinoki, Vetiver
Base — Eucalyptus, Amber, Orange Blossom
fields.ingredients:
Prebiotics — Help balance skin’s microbiome after sweating and activity.

 

Vitamin C — Antioxidant that helps combat environmental stressors and brighten skin.

 

Niacinamide — Also known as Vitamin B3, supports skin's barrier while helping to improve the look of skin texture.

 

Hyaluronic Acid — A water-loving molecule that can hold onto 1000x its weight in moisture. Hydrates while cleansing to keep skin soft.
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Wet Skin","desc":"Start with damp skin in the shower."},{"title":"Apply Cleanser","desc":"Dispense a small amount onto your hands or sponge."},{"title":"Massage Gently","desc":"Work into a rich lather and massage over your body"},{"title":"Rinse Off","desc":"Wash thoroughly and enjoy soft, refreshed skin."}]

fields.name: Dior Forever Skin Glow
fields.description:
Dior Forever Skin Glow is the 24h¹ wear natural glow foundation that combines flawless makeup with skincare benefits, for perfect skin with or without makeup.

Designed to deliver perfect skin even in front of the cameras, its formula combines natural glow with medium-to-high buildable coverage. Ultra-soft and thin, it blends easily and seamlessly into the skin to even out skin tone and blur imperfections. It is formulated to resist heat and humidity, providing no-retouch perfection for 24h¹.

Infused with a trio of skincare ingredients – hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and peptide – this true triple-action care foundation improves bare skin in just 1 week³. Skin appears more radiant, plumped, and even - skin is flawless with or without makeup. With SPF 25 PA+++, skin stays protected and radiant all day.
fields.ingredients:
- FINISH: natural glow
- WEAR: 24h¹ wear, no-retouch
- COVERAGE: flawless buildable medium-to-high coverage
- SKINCARE: hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, peptide
- EFFECTIVENESS: 48h² hydration, visible improvement on bare skin in 1 week³, SPF 25 PA+++
- SHADES: 45 shades, 6 undertones
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Prep Your Skin","desc":"Start with clean, moisturized skin. You can apply primer for a smoother base."},{"title":"Dispense Product","desc":"Take 1–2 pumps of foundation onto your hand."},{"title":"Apply Evenly ","desc":" Use fingers, a brush, or a damp sponge to blend from the center of your face outward."},{"title":"Build Coverage ","desc":" Add more layers if needed for extra coverage while keeping a natural glow."}]

fields.name: Wet n Wild Lip Oil
fields.description: A lightweight, glossy lip oil infused with nourishing oils that hydrates, smooths, and gives your lips a juicy, high-shine finish.
fields.ingredients:
Blend of 7 Oils – Deeply nourishes and softens lips
Jojoba Oil – Helps retain moisture
Avocado Oil – Repairs and conditions dry lips
Vitamin E – Protects and smooths
fields.how_to_use: [{"title":"Prep Lips ","desc":"Start with clean, dry lips."},{"title":"Apply Evenly ","desc":"Swipe the applicator across your lips."},{"title":"Layer if Needed ","desc":" Add extra for more shine or hydration."},{"title":"Reapply Anytime ","desc":"Use throughout the day for soft, glossy lips."}]
